mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, total_price, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, order_status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{totalPrice}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{orderStatus})
